about.subtitle: Serving families across Dindigul with ethical, modern and comfortable dental care.
about.description:
With experienced and certified dentists along with modern equipments, we provide both routine dental treatments and advanced dental procedures in a clean and hygienic environment. Jamuna Family Dental Care combines modern techniques with a gentle & friendly approach to help every patient achieve their dream smile.

At JFDC, we believe in making dentistry transparent, ethical and comfortable for families, young adults and professionals across Dindigul.

testimonials.heading: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.description: Read real stories from our satisfied patients across Dindigul.

reviews.author: Kokila Kalimuthu
reviews.content: Had a great experience at Jamuna Family dental care. Dr Arun sarath sir is very kind and gentle. Procedure was very smooth and pain-free. Very happy with the care and results.

reviews.author: Suki Vignesh
reviews.content: Nice ambience and excellent quality crowns.. very happy to get treated here.. Highly recommending this best dental hospital in dindigul

reviews.author: k. kokila
reviews.content: Recently I visited jamuna family dental care for scaling and root canal treatment. Such a good & calm environment . Highly satisfied with their treatments, Especially doctors and sisters caring.

reviews.author: ராகவேந்திரன் ரெங்கராஜ்
reviews.content: The doctor was very thorough, friendly, and listened with sincerity. I felt comfortable talking to the doctor, who took their time to explain my treatment options clearly. The nurse showed great clarity in her diagnosis and was very good at making me feel at ease.

reviews.author: Antony Flx
reviews.content: I had a very good experience of extraction of the wisdom tooth as well scaling and filling. So gentle and excellent service very kind in approach. Excellently skillful.

reviews.author: karthick karthick
reviews.content: I had the best experience at Jamuna dental..Dr Arun and Dr Priyanka were so well versed with the speciality procedures.. truly the best dental Hosptial in Dindigul

reviews.author: Amal Raj
reviews.content: Treatment was painless drs and staffs were very kind. I had pain in lower teeth did rct and followed by crown. Now i am happy and satisfied thank you dr.

reviews.author: femi living
reviews.content: Good ambience. Patient friendly clinc. I've been to this clinic for the first time for my RCT and at first I was bit hesitant but to be honest it was done perfectly without any complaints.

reviews.author: Richie Robinson
reviews.content: I visited Jamuna Family Dental Care in Dindigul for the first time and I’m very impressed. The staff were professional and welcoming. The dentist took time to explain what I needed.

reviews.author: Sherlock Holmes
reviews.content: I came for Root canal treatment here. It was tested with care and friendly. The doctors were calm and composed and explanatory for the all the doubts and questions.

reviews.author: vivek anandan
reviews.content: Thank you Dr for extracting my wisdom tooth without any discomfort. I am very comfortable and satisfied with treatment. Staffs were very kind.

reviews.author: jansirani santhi
reviews.content: Painless rcts and comfortable crowns.. highly recommended here for all your dental needs

reviews.author: Panimatha Thiyagarajan
reviews.content: Thank you dr for advising right treatment for my problem i had filling in multiple teeth and it was painless treatment.

reviews.author: Ariya Suresh
reviews.content: I have fear about like this teeth pain last week.but I have satisfied like this treatment.because I haven't feel any pain at all.i am fully satisfied.

reviews.author: Katheeja Kabeer
reviews.content: Thank you sir I am happy that I visited this clinic I cam with pain in my lower back tooth and got treated with root canal treatment as suggested by Dr.sindhu.

reviews.author: sugumar t
reviews.content: Comfortable treatments and beautiful crowns given to me.. very happy and fully satisfied

reviews.author: Vignesh Balakrishnan
reviews.content: Treatment was good. Doctors and staff also very calm

reviews.author: RAJ DEV
reviews.content: Came here with gum swelling and bleeding dr.suggested for gum treatment and scaling and treatment was very comfortable.

reviews.author: Ananthi Ananthi
reviews.content: Experience was very comfortable.staffs and doctors were very supportive and caring. Underwent root canal treatment and followed by crown placement.

reviews.author: DAISY RANI
reviews.content: I had a comfortable and painless extraction and post extraction instructions were given properly.

reviews.author: Indira Renganathan
reviews.content: Painless and very comfortable root canals and very economical caps done here.. highly recommended

clinic_gallery.description: Experience our world-class dental care infrastructure in Dindigul.

items.question: What dental treatments do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a full range of dental services including dental implants, root canal treatment, teeth cleaning & scaling, teeth whitening, braces & invisible aligners, cosmetic dentistry, pediatric dentistry, gum treatment, tooth extraction, and smile design.

items.question: Is the treatment painful?
items.answer: We focus on gentle and comfortable treatments. Our experienced & certified dentists use modern techniques and equipment to ensure minimal discomfort during all procedures.

items.question: What are your clinic timings?
items.answer: We are open from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM, all days including weekends. Walk-ins and appointments are both welcome. We offer home visit services too.

items.question: Do you treat children?
items.answer: Yes! We provide specialized pediatric dental care by MDS pedodontist doctors in a fun, comfortable environment designed to make children feel at ease during their visit.

items.question: How long do dental implants last?
items.answer: With proper care and maintenance, dental implants can last a lifetime. They are designed to fuse with your bone, providing a permanent solution for missing teeth.
